race.comment: FABS CUZ (1) has hit the frame at the past couple of outings including a solid third over this track and trip last time out. Gets 2kg off with the claim and draws favourably in gate two. Has to be included in calculations. RIGHTEOUS LEGEND (2) has placed over this mile journey and will be cherry-ripe now fourth run back. Likely to feature in the finish. AMELIORATION (7) hasn't been too far off them of late and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three commodity. OAKFIELD GALAXY (5) has hit the frame in all three runs since joining the new stable and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. SICILIAN WARRIOR (6) next in line for the Geran camp.
